judge_reason: Description A says stamp text is illegible or in 'normal orientation' without specifics, while Description B reads multiple specific, legible verbatim stamp texts (e.g., 'RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT', 'APR 5 2 39 PM '49'), indicating a direct contradiction on whether image text can be read and what it says.
original_image_tags: A light-colored, aged document page with two punch holes at the top. The text below is faint and appears as mirror-image "bleed-through" from the reverse side of the paper, making it largely illegible. Several stamps and handwritten notes are visible in normal orientation at the top and bottom.
Two rectangular pieces of tape, one on either side of the central punch hole.
Multiple stamps and handwritten notes at the bottom of the page.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned page of a typed government memo with a blue stamp at the top reading “RECEIVED TELETYPE UNIT APR 5 2:33 PM ’49 F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE,” plus faint reverse-side text and partial purple approval stamps near the bottom.*
